summary: Test suite covers main functionality (manifest parsing, license classification, compliance reporting) and includes good integration testing via act. However, it has gaps: OutputJson parameter and direct FailOnDenied exit-code testing are missing, edge cases like malformed JSON and empty manifests aren't tested, and fixture files referenced in tests aren't provided (fixtures/all-approved-package.json, has-denied-package.json, mixed-requirements.txt, licenses-config.json, mock-license-db.json). Design is reasonably clean with good helper functions and separation of unit/integration tests, but act integration tests are brittle—they rely on regex matching exact output format, so any cosmetic change to Format-ComplianceReport could break many tests. The 3-case act limit is enforced but covers main paths. Test would catch major regressions but may miss edge cases and parameter combinations.
